description_long: This object is a retro-style portable cassette player, commonly known as a Walkman, accompanied by a pair of over-ear headphones. The main body is rectangular with a turquoise and dark blue color scheme, featuring a transparent hinged door on the front for cassette insertion. Prominent yellow buttons and a sliding volume control are visible on the side, along with a headphone jack at the top where a pinkish cable connects to the headphones. The headphones have round, cushioned ear pads in yellow and white, with a flexible pink headband. The device is compact, designed for personal audio use, and its overall appearance is reminiscent of classic 1980s portable music players.
description: A retro portable cassette player with a turquoise and blue body, yellow buttons, and matching over-ear headphones with a pink headband.
description_view_0: The turquoise front with a transparent cassette door and the 'WALKMAN' label is visible, along with the attached headphones.
description_view_1: The side view shows yellow control buttons, a sliding volume control, and the open cassette door, with the headphone cable plugged in at the top.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the device are visible, showing the solid turquoise back and the dark blue side, with the headphones resting nearby.
description_view_3: The open cassette door is seen from the side, with the headphones and cable arranged in front of the device.
